title: with + O + V-ing/p.p. + 主句

formulas.formula: with + O + V-ing（O主動執行動作）
formulas.zh: 用with獨立分詞構句表示伴隨的主動動作或狀態

formulas.formula: with + O + p.p.（O被動承受動作）
formulas.zh: 用with獨立分詞構句表示伴隨的被動動作或狀態

explanation: with獨立分詞構句是一種高級副詞修飾法，用來表述主句發生時的伴隨狀態、方式或條件。結構為「with + 受詞 + 分詞」，受詞若主動執行動作用V-ing，若被動承受用過去分詞p.p.。此構句不受主句主語限制，可靈活表達複雜的伴隨關係，常見於文學、新聞與學測閱讀。易混淆點：勿與普通介詞片語混淆；分詞的主動被動要與with後的受詞邏輯相符。

examples.eng: With her eyes closed, she listened to the beautiful music carefully.
examples.chi: 閉著眼睛，她仔細聆聽優美的音樂。

examples.eng: The old man sat by the window with his hands trembling slightly.
examples.chi: 老人坐在窗邊，雙手微微顫抖。

examples.eng: With the project finished ahead of schedule, the team celebrated their success.
examples.chi: 專案提前完成，團隊慶祝他們的成功。

examples.eng: She left the room with her head held high and her heart full of hope.
examples.chi: 她昂著頭、懷著希望離開房間。

extension.tip: 判斷分詞類型的關鍵：觀察with後的受詞與分詞的邏輯關係。若受詞「主動做」該動作用V-ing；若受詞「被動承受」該動作用p.p.。例：with the door opening（門自動打開，主動）vs. with the door opened（門被打開，被動）。

examples.test: With the window open, fresh air flowed into the room.
examples.result: → 正確。window與open為被動關係（窗被打開），用p.p.

examples.test: With students studying hard, the teacher smiled with satisfaction.
examples.result: → 正確。students與studying為主動關係（學生主動唸書），用V-ing

examples.test: X With the rain falling, she went out without an umbrella. (邏輯矛盾)
examples.result: → 此句文法正確但邏輯不合。若要表達伴隨的雨勢，應改為considering the rain或in the rain

extension.note: with獨立分詞三步判斷法：①確認with後的名詞 ②判斷名詞與動詞的邏輯（主動或被動） ③選用對應的分詞形式

parts: , creating an unforgettable moment for the audience.
exercises.sentence: The singer performed on stage with her voice rising, creating an unforgettable moment for the audience.
exercises.translation: 歌手的聲音在上升的情況下在舞台上表演，為觀眾創造了難忘的時刻。

parts: , the ancient temple remains a sacred place for pilgrims worldwide.
exercises.sentence: With centuries passed, the ancient temple remains a sacred place for pilgrims worldwide.
exercises.translation: 雖然幾個世紀已經過去，這座古老的寺廟仍然是全世界朝聖者的聖地。

parts: The athlete crossed the finish line
blanks: with sweat dripping down his face
exercises.sentence: The athlete crossed the finish line with sweat dripping down his face, raising his trophy in triumph.
exercises.translation: 運動員汗水滑落臉龐地衝過終點線，勝利地舉起獎杯。

parts: She sat in the dark room
, waiting for news from the hospital.
blanks: with all the lights turned off
exercises.sentence: She sat in the dark room with all the lights turned off, waiting for news from the hospital.
exercises.translation: 她坐在所有燈都關掉的黑暗房間裡，等待醫院的消息。

vocab_table_label: 常用 with 獨立結構

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的with獨立分詞構句，表達伴隨狀態
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ the door open, fresh air flowed into the room.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B。door與open為被動關係（門被打開），應使用過去分詞p.p.。A選項opening表主動，邏輯不符；C選項to open為不定式，不適用於with獨立分詞構句；D選項being open過於冗長，此情境不需要。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷分詞形式：她在唱歌時臉上帶著微笑
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______, she walked gracefully across the stage.

options.text: With her chin being raised high
With her chin to raise high

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。chin與raise為被動關係（下巴被抬高），應使用過去分詞raised。B選項raising表主動執行動作，邏輯錯誤；C選項being raised過於冗長；D選項to raise為不定式，不符with獨立分詞構句結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷主動被動關係：孩子邊唱歌邊走來
mc_exercises.question_eng: The child came toward us _______, his face beaming with joy.

options.text: with his hands holding a flower
with a flower holding in his hands
with his hands being held a flower
with a flower to be held in his hands

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。hands與holding為主動關係（手主動拿著），應使用現在分詞holding。B選項holding放在被動語境但不符合with結構；C選項being held造成邏輯混亂；D選項不定式to be held不適用此構句。with的受詞（hands）為主動執行者。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複雜情境：選擇正確分詞形式表達伴隨條件
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______, the conference proceeded smoothly despite the challenging circumstances.

options.text: With all participants attending actively and taking notes carefully
With all participants attended actively and taken notes carefully
With all participants having attended actively and having taken notes carefully
With all participants to attend actively and to take notes carefully

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。participants與attend、take為主動關係，應使用現在分詞attending和taking形成平行結構。B選項混用了過去分詞，邏輯錯誤；C選項完成式having attended/taken過於複雜，此情境不需；D選項不定式to attend/take不符with獨立分詞構句的語法要求。需保持主動分詞的平行結構。
